deep_dive.title: WAM-TTT: Steering World-Action Models by Watching Human Play at Test Time
deep_dive.abstract: Steering robot foundation models (RFMs) toward new task variants or user-preferred behaviors remains challenging, often requiring additional robot demonstrations, task-specific fine-tuning, or long-context conditioning. We present WAM-TTT, a test-time training framework for steering world action models from raw human videos. Rather than treating human videos as trajectories to imitate, WAM-TTT absorbs them into a lightweight adaptive memory inside a frozen WAM through self-supervised video prediction. To make this memory useful for control, we introduce a meta-training stage that aligns human demonstrations with robot behaviors using paired human-robot data and a key--value memory reconstruction objective. At test time, only unlabeled human videos are required to adapt the memory, while the pretrained WAM remains frozen. This enables efficient and reusable steering without robot actions, human-side annotations, or task-specific fine-tuning, while preserving the generalization ability of the foundation model. Extensive experiments show that WAM-TTT consistently outperforms in-context human-video conditioning baselines across diverse manipulation tasks and generalization settings.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: steering world action models via test-time training on human videos
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过测试时训练在人类视频上引导世界动作模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过测试时训练在人类视频上引导世界动作模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过测试时训练在人类视频上引导世界动作模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: WAM-TTT steers frozen world action models by absorbing human videos into a lightweight memory via self-supervised video prediction at test time.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有机器人基础模型调整需要额外演示或微调。WAM-TTT提出测试时训练框架，通过自监督视频预测将人类视频吸收进轻量级自适应记忆，从而引导冻结的世界动作模型。元训练阶段使用成对人机数据对齐人类演示与机器人行为。该方法无需微调即可适应新任务，展示了世界动作模型与人类视频的有效结合，是直接针对世界动作模型的核心论文。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有机器人基础模型调整需要额外演示或微调。WAM-TTT提出测试时训练框架，通过自监督视频预测将人类视频吸收进轻量级自适应记忆，从而引导冻结的世界动作模型。元训练阶段使用成对人机数据对齐人类演示与机器人行为。该方法无需微调即可适应新任务，展示了世界动作模型与人类视频的有效结合，是直接针对世界动作模型的核心论文。

deep_dive.title: Infinite Worlds with Versatile Interactions
deep_dive.abstract: We present LingBot-World 2.0 (also known as LingBot-World-Infinity), an advanced iteration of LingBot-World featuring four distinct upgrades. (1) Our model achieves an unbounded interaction horizon while maintaining consistent output quality, benefiting from a carefully crafted causal pretraining paradigm. (2) Through distilling a real-time variant from the base model, our system guarantees rapid response time, sufficient to drive 720p video streams at 60 fps. (3) Compared to the previous version, this update introduces highly diverse interactive elements, comprising a broader spectrum of actions (e.g., attacking, archery, spell-casting, and shooting) alongside a richer variety of text-driven events. (4) We pioneer the integration of an agentic harness within the domain of world modeling, wherein a pilot agent is tasked with planning and executing character behaviors, while a director agent is responsible for synthesizing novel environmental elements as the scene progresses. Additionally, to facilitate a shared experience, we develop an interface that permits multiple players to simultaneously immerse themselves in this vivid world simulator. We pair our primary 14B model with a lightweight 1.3B counterpart, which supports effortless deployment on a single GPU.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Infinite Worlds with versatile interactions - a world action model
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 具有多样化交互的无限世界——一种世界动作模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 具有多样化交互的无限世界——一种世界动作模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 具有多样化交互的无限世界——一种世界动作模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: LingBot-World 2.0 achieves unbounded interaction horizon and 60fps 720p video generation with diverse actions and an agentic harness.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有交互式世界模型在交互范围和内容多样性上存在限制。LingBot-World 2.0通过因果预训练实现无限交互视界，并蒸馏出实时变体支持720p/60fps视频生成。系统新增攻击、射箭等多种动作和文本驱动事件，并首创在域内集成智能体控制系统。这项工作直接实现了基于视频生成的世界动作模型，是视频生成驱动世界动作模型的典型代表。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有交互式世界模型在交互范围和内容多样性上存在限制。LingBot-World 2.0通过因果预训练实现无限交互视界，并蒸馏出实时变体支持720p/60fps视频生成。系统新增攻击、射箭等多种动作和文本驱动事件，并首创在域内集成智能体控制系统。这项工作直接实现了基于视频生成的世界动作模型，是视频生成驱动世界动作模型的典型代表。

deep_dive.title: Latent Clarity: Bridging World-Model Kinematics to Semantic Manifolds for Video Anomaly Anticipation
deep_dive.abstract: Continuous video anomaly detection is dominated by reactive Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) that collapses spatiotemporal features into scalar scores. We introduce PULS (Predictive Unified Latent Space), a continuous semantic world-model pipeline comprising two modules: a 490M-parameter KSD Bridge (Kinematic-to-Semantic Distillation) and a 16.8M-parameter Anticipatory State Predictor (ASP). The KSD Bridge maps V-JEPA 2 physical tensors into the 2048-d Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B text-aligned hypersphere, trained on a subset of UCF-Crime. This translation alone yields a chunk-level AUROC of 0.8994 for UCF-Crime and 0.8162 for out-of-distribution XD-Violence without MIL or hierarchical fusion.   We introduce and validate the Latent Clarity Hypothesis: because JEPA's temporal predictor discards aleatoric pixel noise while preserving kinematics, anticipated future representations are more semantically separable than observed presents. The ASP sharpens these anticipated future latents, achieving 44.5% mean 14-way zero-shot VQA accuracy (exceeding observation baseline by +9.6 pp). Applying the ASP to Observation Tensors collapses accuracy to 7.3% (random chance), proving Anticipation and Observation occupy distinct sub-manifolds. A Triple-Track Lead-Time protocol with an L1-surprise gate yields a peak +8.9 pp anticipatory advantage at T-0.5s (p < 0.001, N = 1,000 permutation), separating physical anticipation from static scene priors. Zero-shot transfer to XD-Violence confirms that Newtonian-invariant kinematic representations generalize out-of-distribution.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes a continuous semantic world-model pipeline for video anomaly anticipation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出用于视频异常预测的连续语义世界模型管道
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出用于视频异常预测的连续语义世界模型管道
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出用于视频异常预测的连续语义世界模型管道
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: PULS pipeline bridges world-model kinematics to semantic manifolds for video anomaly anticipation, achieving high AUROC without MIL.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对连续视频异常检测中缺乏语义世界模型的问题，提出PULS连续语义世界模型管道，包含KSD桥接器将V-JEPA运动张量映射到文本对齐语义空间，以及ASP预测器进行未来状态预测。在UCF-Crime和XD-Violence数据集上，仅靠KSD桥接就达到0.8994和0.8162的AUROC，无需多实例学习或特征融合。该方法验证了世界模型在视频异常预测中的有效性，为视频理解提供了新的语义运动桥接范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对连续视频异常检测中缺乏语义世界模型的问题，提出PULS连续语义世界模型管道，包含KSD桥接器将V-JEPA运动张量映射到文本对齐语义空间，以及ASP预测器进行未来状态预测。在UCF-Crime和XD-Violence数据集上，仅靠KSD桥接就达到0.8994和0.8162的AUROC，无需多实例学习或特征融合。该方法验证了世界模型在视频异常预测中的有效性，为视频理解提供了新的语义运动桥接范式。

deep_dive.title: Scaling Mixture-of-Experts Video Pretraining for Embodied Intelligence
deep_dive.abstract: Despite the recent promise in robot control, video generative models suffer from a domain mismatch due to their primary focus on content creation. For example, their design inherently prioritizes visual fidelity and creativity over computational efficiency and physical realism. In this work, we present LingBot-Video, a DiT-based video pretraining paradigm specifically tailored for embodied intelligence. From the architecture perspective, we adopt the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), instead of dense, framework to achieve a better trade-off between modeling capacity and inference efficiency, and manage to scale it up from scratch. From the data perspective, we construct a data profiling engine that augments standard internet videos with extensive robot-oriented footage, encompassing manipulation, navigation, and egocentric perspectives, to equip the base model with an intrinsic understanding of actions and world dynamics. From the training perspective, we develop a multi-dimensional reward system to enforce the alignment regarding physical rationality and task completion, going beyond standard criteria such as aesthetics, prompt-following, and motion consistency. Comprehensive evaluations validate its performance and efficiency as a video foundation model. We contribute LingBot-Video as the inaugural large-scale, open-source MoE video foundation model to the community, in a pioneering effort to bridge digital creativity and physical actuation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Video pretraining paradigm for embodied intelligence, addressing domain mismatch in video generation for robots
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向具身智能的视频预训练范式，解决视频生成领域偏移
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向具身智能的视频预训练范式，解决视频生成领域偏移
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向具身智能的视频预训练范式，解决视频生成领域偏移
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: LingBot-Video proposes MoE-based video pretraining tailored for embodied AI, improving efficiency and physical realism.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: LingBot-Video针对现有视频生成模型在机器人控制中的领域偏移，提出基于混合专家（MoE）的DiT视频预训练框架，从架构和数据两方面优化，实现模型容量与推理效率的平衡，并在机器人下游任务上取得更优性能，为世界模型提供了更适用的视频生成基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: LingBot-Video针对现有视频生成模型在机器人控制中的领域偏移，提出基于混合专家（MoE）的DiT视频预训练框架，从架构和数据两方面优化，实现模型容量与推理效率的平衡，并在机器人下游任务上取得更优性能，为世界模型提供了更适用的视频生成基础。

quick_skim.title: TACO: TActile World Model as a Self-COrrector forScalable VLA Post-Training
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown promising generalization in robotic manipulation, but they still struggle with contact-rich tasks, where minor contact perturbations can cause unrecoverable failures that are hard to detect from vision alone. Since these failures are localized rather than task-level semantic errors, tactile-aware corrective post-training offers an efficient way to improve recovery. However, scaling such supervision through human intervention is costly. Recent works have explored world models to synthesize imagined rollouts for policy improvement, but vision-only world models may produce visually plausible yet contact-inconsistent trajectories. We therefore introduce TACO, a tactile-aware world-model-driven framework for scalable VLA post-training in contact-rich manipulation. Given real robot rollouts, TACO follows a Recognize-Imagine-Label loop with a tactile-aware world model: a unified progress-action model recognizes failure-adjacent states using progress estimates, a visuo-tactile generation model imagines local correction segments, and the progress-action model labels them with executable corrective actions. To incorporate tactile corrective supervision into VLA post-training, TACO combines knowledge-insulated tactile adaptation with advantage-conditioned training, enabling the policy to learn from imagined corrections without degrading pretrained visual-language priors. These components enable TACO to convert real-world failures into imagined visuo-tactile corrections for iterative VLA post-training. Experiments on real-world contact-rich manipulation tasks show that TACO achieves 44% absolute success rate improvement over the base policy and 32% over the policy without knowledge-insulated tactile adaptation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: TActile World Model explicitly uses world model for VLA post-training
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 触觉世界模型显式用于VLA后训练
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 触觉世界模型显式用于VLA后训练
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 触觉世界模型显式用于VLA后训练
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: TACO proposes a tactile-aware world model to generate corrective rollouts for VLA, improving contact-rich manipulation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: TACO针对VLA模型在接触性任务中难以从视觉检测失败的问题，提出触觉感知的世界模型框架，通过生成触觉一致的校正轨迹进行后训练，在精细操作任务上显著提升成功率，展示了多模态世界模型在机器人学习中的价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: TACO针对VLA模型在接触性任务中难以从视觉检测失败的问题，提出触觉感知的世界模型框架，通过生成触觉一致的校正轨迹进行后训练，在精细操作任务上显著提升成功率，展示了多模态世界模型在机器人学习中的价值。

quick_skim.title: Vidu S1: A Real-Time Interactive Video Generation Model
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce Vidu S1, a real-time interactive video generation model supporting voice control of digital characters. Users can control video generation content at any moment through voice instructions. Vidu S1 supports infinite-length real-time video generation without blurring, drift, or visual distortion. Built with TurboDiffusion and TurboServe, Vidu S1 outputs 540p real-time videos at up to 42 FPS on regular consumer GPUs. Users can upload custom images of real people, anime, and pets, and choose different voice tones for personalized experiences. Experiments show that Vidu S1 achieves the best performance across all test metrics while fully meeting real-time inference requirements. A playable online demo is available at https://vidu.com/vidu-stream.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 实时交互式视频生成模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 实时交互式视频生成模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 实时交互式视频生成模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Vidu S1 is a real-time interactive video generation model with voice control, supporting infinite-length generation at up to 42 FPS on consumer GPUs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 实时交互式视频生成面临模糊、漂移和计算开销大等挑战。Vidu S1基于TurboDiffusion和TurboServe架构，支持语音控制角色，实现无限时长、无视觉失真的实时视频生成（消费级GPU上42 FPS），为视频世界模型的交互式生成和实时推理提供了可行方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 实时交互式视频生成面临模糊、漂移和计算开销大等挑战。Vidu S1基于TurboDiffusion和TurboServe架构，支持语音控制角色，实现无限时长、无视觉失真的实时视频生成（消费级GPU上42 FPS），为视频世界模型的交互式生成和实时推理提供了可行方案。

quick_skim.title: Validate the Dream Before You Trust Its Verdict: Admissibility for World-Model Simulators
quick_skim.abstract: Across robotics, World Models (WMs) are increasingly used to evaluate action policies by simulating the consequences of actions in an imagined world, and returning a success or safety verdict. Yet a verdict is only as trustworthy as the WM that produced it, and the WM itself needs to be certified. In video-generation WMs, fidelity metrics such as Fréchet Video Distance (FVD) reward visual realism, but ignore whether the world responds correctly to the policy's actions, including those unseen in training. Classical simulation-based validation assumes a trusted simulator evaluating an untrusted policy, whereas generative WMs are themselves unverified learned artifacts. Hence, we argue that any WM used as a test oracle must first be accredited before its verdicts can serve as evidence. Building on credibility practices from safety-critical simulation, including Verification, Validation & Accreditation (VV&A), Safety of the Intended Functionality (SOTIF), and scenario-based testing standards, we define an admissibility ladder (L0-L4) that a WM must climb before its closed-loop verdicts are accepted as assurance evidence. Our framework is embodiment-agnostic, and is instantiated in autonomous driving (AD), where assurance methods for traditional simulation are most mature. Applied to two driving WMs, the lower rungs reveal a reversal: the model that ranks higher on visual generation quality (L0) ranks lower on action-following (L1-L2), so visual fidelity does not predict the action-robustness a closed-loop verdict depends on.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Admissibility framework for world-model simulators in robotics
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向机器人世界模型模拟器的可采纳性验证框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向机器人世界模型模拟器的可采纳性验证框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向机器人世界模型模拟器的可采纳性验证框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper argues for certifying world models used as test oracles, proposing an admissibility framework beyond visual fidelity to ensure correct action responses.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文指出视频生成世界模型作为测试预言机时，仅凭视觉保真度指标不足以评估其可信度，因为模型可能对未见动作响应错误。作者提出一种可采纳性框架，要求世界模型在用作评估策略之前必须经过严格的认证，不仅关注视觉质量，更要确保对动作的正确响应。该工作为世界模型的安全部署提供了重要指导。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文指出视频生成世界模型作为测试预言机时，仅凭视觉保真度指标不足以评估其可信度，因为模型可能对未见动作响应错误。作者提出一种可采纳性框架，要求世界模型在用作评估策略之前必须经过严格的认证，不仅关注视觉质量，更要确保对动作的正确响应。该工作为世界模型的安全部署提供了重要指导。
